def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Sort by code and date for per-code rolling operations
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    # Part A: rank(sum(delay(close, 5), 20) / 20) * correlation(close, volume, 2)
    delayed_close = delay(pl.col('close'), periods=5)
    sum_delayed_close = rolling_sum(delayed_close, window=20) / 20
    rank_a = rank(sum_delayed_close).over('date')

    corr_close_volume = rolling_corr(pl.col('close'), pl.col('volume'), window=2)

    part_a = rank_a * corr_close_volume

    # Part B: rank(correlation(sum(close, 5), sum(close, 20), 2))
    sum_close_5 = rolling_sum(pl.col('close'), window=5)
    sum_close_20 = rolling_sum(pl.col('close'), window=20)
    corr_sum5_sum20 = rolling_corr(sum_close_5, sum_close_20, window=2)
    rank_b = rank(corr_sum5_sum20).over('date')

    # Final: -1 * (part_a * rank_b)
    factor = -1 * (part_a * rank_b)

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
